plugins.name: trendfinder
plugins.description: Turn TikTok/Instagram trend data into content decisions inside Claude Cowork. Detect-first onboarding (backend URL + API key, Apify connector for on-demand scrapes, niches, optional schedules, optional first avatar); skills for scraping, trend-radar, trend-briefing (Live Artifact), scheduling, avatar-studio (brand + persona + DNA) and script-studio (avatar-voiced hooks + scripts matched to trends natively); plus the Trendfinder-Cockpit. Every skill ends with an interactive next-step option block. AI synthesis runs natively in Cowork; the backend only stores and scrapes.
